title: Provenance
description: Lineage attached to every derived artifact and every answer. Enables reproduction, correction propagation, and deletion enumeration.

source_document_id.description: Stable ID of the immutable original.

source_revision.description: Revision/version of the source document this artifact derives from.

source_checksum.description: Checksum of the original object at processing time.

source_coordinates.description: Where in the source this artifact came from (page, section, bbox, char span).

processing_versions.description: Exact versions of every processing step, so an artifact can be reproduced or invalidated when a step changes.
